classes.reasoning: Explicitly labeled 'eCRF -- END OF TREATMENT (EOT) VISIT' with structured per-patient data fields including patient ID (BRC471-FR01-005), site ID (FR-01), visit date, treatment cycles, dose information, response assessments, and investigator signature block typical of case report forms.

summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form documenting the end-of-treatment visit for patient BRC471-FR01-005 enrolled at site FR-01 in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The form captures the reason for discontinuation (radiographic disease progression), treatment duration from June to December 2023 spanning 5 complete cycles and part of cycle 6, best overall response of partial response lasting 98 days, and post-study treatment plans.
